crime.value: Multiple murders and mutilation - Face Keeper kills people and removes their faces for his collection
crime.quote: it's said that the face keeper caught them and torn their face off to put in his collection

victim.value: Multiple victims including teenagers, police captain's daughter, and townspeople - targeted seemingly randomly
victim.quote: A group of teenagers went camping but never returned

closed_world.value: Small West Virginia town surrounded by woods where the Face Keeper lives
closed_world.quote: Deep within the woods that seem to consume West Virgina lived a old man

culprit_and_motive.value: Jack Ryan (the Face Keeper) - escaped mental patient motivated by revenge against townspeople
culprit_and_motive.quote: He told them that it was because of them that made him live in the woods for so long

resolution.value: Mayor shoots the Face Keeper, but his death triggers explosives that destroy the entire town with fire
resolution.quote: My heart monitor is linked to about fourteen charges on the main coal mines in this town

red_herring.value: Initial misdirection that the Face Keeper is responsible for all disappearances when he's actually just a mental patient
red_herring.quote: everyone blamed the Face Keeper for it.They blamed him because the last time she was saw was going into the woods

social_world.value: Small town power structure with police captain, mayor, judge, and townspeople - institutional breakdown after captain loses job
social_world.quote: The captain lost his job because he shot a young man coming out of the woods,he thought it was the face keeper

reveal_mechanic.value: Heart monitor linked to explosive charges in coal mines - mechanical death trap revelation
reveal_mechanic.quote: My heart monitor is linked to about fourteen charges on the main coal mines in this town

media_and_audience.value: Supernatural folklore of the Face Keeper used to explain disappearances and violence in the community
media_and_audience.quote: He was said to be a metal patient that broke out of the insane silo about 20 years ago

_meta.title: ebook the general himself the face keeper
